title: Grayscale files S-1 for first US Worldcoin ETF
summary: Grayscale files S-1 for first US Worldcoin ETF
briefing: The filing expands Grayscale’s growing lineup of crypto-related exchange-traded products outside of Bitcoin and Ether.

title: Celsius co-founders Leon, Goldstein to pay FTC over $6M
summary: Celsius co-founders Leon, Goldstein to pay FTC over $6M
briefing: The settlements add to former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky’s $10 million FTC settlement in April.

title: Binance & OKX users face $1900 fines in Vietnam, Coinbase in China? Asia Express
summary: Binance & OKX users face $1900 fines in Vietnam, Coinbase in China? Asia Express
briefing: Retail users in Vietnam who trade on offshore crypto exchanges like Binance or OKX face heavy penalties. Network School controversy in Malaysia over Israeli citizen ban.

title: London Stock Exchange eyes overnight trading launch in 2027: FT
summary: London Stock Exchange eyes overnight trading launch in 2027: FT
briefing: The move comes as traditional exchanges face growing competition from crypto markets and tokenized equity platforms that offer around-the-clock trading.

title: Patrick Witt defers military training as CLARITY heads to Senate
summary: Patrick Witt defers military training as CLARITY heads to Senate
briefing: The decision keeps the administration’s chief crypto policy negotiator in place during what could be a decisive few weeks for the CLARITY Act.

title: Democrats added certain consumer protection rules to CLARITY: Coinbase exec
summary: Democrats added certain consumer protection rules to CLARITY: Coinbase exec
briefing: Coinbase vice chair Ryan VanGrack said that Democratic lawmakers had added provisions on customer protection to a digital asset market structure bill under consideration in the US Senate.

title: Tether Gold recognized as Accepted Spot Commodity in Abu Dhabi financial center
summary: Tether Gold recognized as Accepted Spot Commodity in Abu Dhabi financial center
briefing: The recognition allows regulated firms in Abu Dhabi Global Market to offer services involving Tether Gold as tokenized commodities gain broader adoption.

title: Bitcoin defies recent tech stocks sell-off. Are bulls eyeing $70K rally?
summary: Bitcoin defies recent tech stocks sell-off. Are bulls eyeing $70K rally?
briefing: Despite muted derivatives sentiment, Bitcoin’s decoupling and Strategy’s cash raise set the stage for a potential rally to $70,000.

title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
summary: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
briefing: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
summary: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
briefing: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

title: Cardano Triggers Hard Fork With First Community-Voted Upgrade
summary: Cardano Triggers Hard Fork With First Community-Voted Upgrade
briefing: For the first time in Cardano's history, no company flipped the switch on a major protocol update.

title: Bitcoin ETFs Are Green Again—Here’s Why Investors Should Zoom Out
summary: Bitcoin ETFs Are Green Again—Here’s Why Investors Should Zoom Out
briefing: Two consecutive weeks of inflows ended the worst sustained outflow streak in Bitcoin ETF history. Here's why patience may be required from investors.

title: Tom Lee's Bitmine Taps the Brakes on ETH Buys, Pivots $86M Into Stock Buyback
summary: Tom Lee's Bitmine Taps the Brakes on ETH Buys, Pivots $86M Into Stock Buyback
briefing: "The reduced pace of buys reflects that Bitmine repurchased 5.5 million common shares," Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said in a statement.

title: Strategy Pads Cash Reserve By $225M With MSTR Sale, Bitcoin Stash Remains Untouched
summary: Strategy Pads Cash Reserve By $225M With MSTR Sale, Bitcoin Stash Remains Untouched
briefing: For the second consecutive week, Saylor's company sold MSTR stock instead of BTC to pad its reserves to $3.2 billion.

title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
summary: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
briefing: An attacker used a flash loan to distort the bridge's Solana stablecoin pools before moving the proceeds to Ethereum, security firms said.

title: Morning Minute: Hyperliquid Opens Prediction Markets to Anyone in HIP-4 Upgrade
summary: Morning Minute: Hyperliquid Opens Prediction Markets to Anyone in HIP-4 Upgrade
